message:
Command `echo "$(date)"
echo "=== Process states ==="
pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" | head -1 && echo "LR running" || echo "LR DONE"
pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1 && echo "Yosys running" || echo "Yosys DONE"
echo ""
echo "=== Run dir steps ==="
ls -t /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/ | grep "^[0-9]"
echo ""
echo "=== Monitor log tail ==="
tail -5 /tmp/wrapper_monitor.log 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== Drain log ==="
wc -l /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null
tail -3 /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
